description.value: Price 4,400 gp; Slot none; CL 5th; Weight 2 lbs.; Aura faint illusion DESCRIPTION This +1 hand crossbow seems to hide itself and leaps from hiding when needed. It grants a +5 competence bonus on Sleight of Hand checks made to conceal it and doesn’t take longer to draw when concealed. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 2,400 gp; Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells invisibility
